message: Superficial granule cells and deep granule cells have distinct morphology, recruitment, action-potential properties, and spike-train summaries. Do not pool sGC and dGC rows unless the validation target is explicitly configured to do so.
source_location: Figure 4 source-data tables and subtype comparison figures

message: MC/TC and GC firing-rate validation targets use different cell classes and may use different current-injection protocols. Existing MC/TC values use 2 s depolarizing steps from 0 to 300 pA in 50 pA increments, with gain defined as the maximum linear slope. GC rows must be compared only against matching protocol_id rows unless an explicit normalization or reanalysis step is implemented.

message: Digitized f-I curves are lower-confidence than machine-readable source-data points. Every digitized row must include source_location, a digitization manifest, and an explicit confidence value.
